subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team.

We’d be glad to set up an introductory call next week. The following time windows work on our side:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 (UTC)

Please let us know which option you prefer, or suggest an alternative if none of these are convenient for you.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For any external inquiries or to reach the appropriate stakeholders, please use the contact channels listed on our public website, and messages will be routed accordingly.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
